## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📖 Docs
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor / internal
- [ ] ⚡ Perf
- [ ] 🧪 Test only

## Checklist

- [ ] Related issue linked (if non-trivial)
- [ ] Respects the three-layer architecture (article / concept / graph)
- [ ] New user-facing behavior has a CLI subcommand (no heredocs in skill.md)
- [ ] New write ops have a matching `*-verify` command
- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes locally
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing (`README.md` / `skill.md` / `CHANGELOG.md`)
